results.evidence: History entry written in skill-create-routes.ts:417-428 at create time per FR-001 (skill dir doesn't exist at generate time)
Entry includes model, provider, timestamp, skill_name fields at lines 419-426
generate: { prompt: body.description, result: content } at line 427
api-routes.ts:335-348 writes history with type: 'eval-generate' in generate-evals handler
Entry includes model, provider, timestamp, skill_name. Case count inferrable from generate.result JSON
listHistory reads type from data.type without filtering; api-routes.ts:734 includes eval-generate in type filter
HistoryPage.tsx:47-56 TYPE_PILL map has instruct, ai-generate, eval-generate entries
HistoryPage.tsx:118-120 FilterBar has AI Edit, AI Generate, Eval Generate options
benchmark.ts:62, benchmark-history.ts:16,26,34 include both new types in unions
eval-ui types.ts:90,121,131,162 match backend type unions

findings.title: History written at create-time rather than generate-time
findings.issue: AC-US1-01 wording says /api/skills/generate writes history, but implementation writes at /api/skills/create time
findings.suggestion: FR-001 explicitly prescribes this approach since skill dir doesn't exist at generate time. Current implementation is correct per spec.
findings.impact: None - implementation matches FR-001 functional requirement

findings.title: Eval-generate history uses empty cases array instead of count
findings.issue: cases: [] instead of populated array or explicit count field
findings.suggestion: Case count is available from generate.result JSON string. Minor data enrichment opportunity.
findings.impact: Low - eval count data exists in generate.result field
